output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?countryLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q131792 wdt:P17 ?country .
  ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?countryLabel) = 'en')
}
output.result:
Got 2 rows and 1 column:
| countryLabel        |
| ------------------- |
| Venezuela (lang:en) |
| Colombia (lang:en)  |
output.answer: The Orinoco River is located in Venezuela and Colombia.
output.formatted:
The Orinoco River is located in Venezuela and Colombia.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?countryLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q131792 wdt:P17 ?country .
  ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?countryLabel) = 'en')
}
```

Execution result:
Got 2 rows and 1 column:
| countryLabel        |
| ------------------- |
| Venezuela (lang:en) |
| Colombia (lang:en)  |
